title: Rocket Reusability Revolutionized

scenes.text: China has successfully recovered a rocket after its first flight—game changer for space travel!
The Long March 10B rocket marks a significant leap in reusable rocket technology.
Reusability could drastically reduce the cost of space missions, making them more accessible.
This innovation could open new frontiers in space exploration!
scenes.label: NEW FRONTIERS!

scenes.text: Follow to feed your curious mind daily.

description: China's successful recovery of the Long March 10B marks a major advancement in reusable rocket technology. Follow for daily science!
